race.comment: The well-related BRAVEHEART (1) (full to G2 winner King Of Sparta) is a former Sydney galloper having his first run for the Gollan yard but should find this class a touch easier than what he was facing down south. Revved up for this with two recent trial placings and a strong showing while fresh would not surprise. BEREZKA (2) has placed four of six over this six-furlong journey, gets 2kg off with the claim and draws favourably in gate three. Plenty to like about her prospects. CLIMACTIC (3) is back from a lengthy spell but the form he showed when last in work was good enough for a race like this. Include from the inside marble. MR BUBBALUSKI (4) strips fitter third-up from the spell and may earn some minor money. QUICKZOU (10) next best in an open race to close out the card.
